description_long: This wallet features a prominent embossed horse head motif on its front panel, set against a textured black leather background with brown leather trim. The front is accented by two metallic snap buttons at the lower corners, which likely serve as part of the closure mechanism. The back of the wallet is a smooth, rich brown leather with visible natural grain and no additional decoration. The sides reveal a slim profile with visible stitching along the edges and a hint of a zipper or internal compartment. The craftsmanship is highlighted by the detailed embossing, contrast stitching, and the use of high-quality leather materials. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for carrying personal items in an urban environment.
description: A leather wallet with an embossed horse head motif, black and brown panels, and metallic snap buttons. Features detailed stitching and a smooth brown back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed horse head motif on black textured leather, brown trim, and two metallic snap buttons.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wallet's slim profile, visible stitching, and a glimpse of a zipper or compartment.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a plain, smooth brown leather surface with natural grain and contrast stitching.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and edge stitching.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Embossed horse head motif on the front panel with textured black leather background and contrast stitching.
